title: Cleaner desktop dashboard chrome
items: Removed repeated desktop branding, account details and duplicate Owner View controls now that the global navbar already provides them.
Kept the server context and dashboard-specific navigation while removing duplicated Documentation and Changelog links from the sidebar.
Rebuilt the desktop footer as a compact dark application bar and corrected the shell height so the bottom of short pages no longer feels detached.

title: Full-width desktop dashboard shell
items: Removed the desktop gaps around the top navigation, dashboard application shell and footer so the dashboard reaches every viewport edge.
Kept the dashboard content responsive while limiting the full-bleed treatment to desktop and preserving the existing mobile layout.
Removed the unintended server-list Remove buttons; owner removal remains inside each server Overview page.

title: Owner-only server removal controls
items: Added a protected Owner View danger zone inside each server Overview page for removing Meowz from that server.
Requires typing the exact server name before the destructive action is enabled and rechecks the configured bot owner on the backend.
Routes the request through the secured bot API so the bot leaves the selected server without exposing the Discord bot token to the browser.

title: Reliable bottom status and save stack
items: Replaced the calculated status-card offsets with one shared bottom floating host for status feedback and unsaved changes.
Kept status messages directly above the save controls without relying on Android viewport-height guesses that could push them off screen.
Preserved the responsive glass styling, safe-area spacing, multi-tab draft saving and read-only demo behavior.
